response.original_title: There Is Love For You//You Will Find Them Again
response.overview: Direct animation on 16mm and GIFs that have been glitched and drawn on by hand come together to observe how gender is portrayed in various forms of media. Particularly related to the trans experience, the piece observes and dissects various representations of femininity, masculinity, gender nonconformity, and transness. Images of various children’s cartoons and video game characters are set against modern representations of trans people actually played by trans actors in roles that are well rounded and nonexploitative.
response.title: There Is Love For You//You Will Find Them Again
